ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic variable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the demographic variable */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the demographic variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the demographic variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic variable */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic variable for the demographic group */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the demographic variable value */,
  "margin_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the demographic variable value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_values_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom segment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_segments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_variables" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom segment */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic variable */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic variable for the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic variable */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic variable for the demographic group */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the demographic variable value */,
  "margin_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the demographic variable value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)
